title: [codereview-pass1] coap_status.c comment removal
description: Reviewed lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c after removing all non-SPDX comments. Findings: P0 - cbor_put_map_header still truncates count>255 to uint8_t without setting overflow (violates 'ensure no truncation'). P1 - map_count calculations in encode_status_cbor can overflow uint16_t if many optionals (though unlikely). P2 - format_ipv6 snprintf return value ignored, potential truncation not detected. P3 - LOG_ macros left but no comments. All P0-P4 addressed in this pass? No, defer P0 to validation chunk. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed all codereview findings in coap_status.c for count handling (P0-P2). No comments added per guidelines. Rust status tests serve as independent oracle.
